index.0.zh: 奇幻假期 FANTASTIC VACATION | 全球高端游艇定制与私人海享生活缔造者
index.0.en: Fantastic Vacation | Global Luxury Yacht Customization & Private Marine Lifestyle Creator

index.35.zh: 从概念设计到远洋交付，从日间巡航到环球航行，我们重新定义每一寸海洋体验。
index.35.en: From concept design to ocean delivery, from day cruising to global voyages, we redefine every inch of the marine experience.

index.45.zh: 我们不只是游艇服务商，更是您海洋生活方式的全方位策展人
index.45.en: We are not just a yacht service provider, but your all-around curator of marine lifestyle

index.48.zh: 从游艇研发设计、船厂制造监造，到交付后的运营管理、维修保养、保险合规——我们提供游艇全生命周期的一站式解决方案。
index.48.en: From yacht R&D design, shipyard manufacturing supervision, to post-delivery operation management, maintenance, insurance & compliance — we provide one-stop solutions for the entire yacht lifecycle.

index.52.zh: 携手意大利、荷兰、德国等全球顶尖船舶设计事务所，将艺术美学与工程性能完美融合，每艘游艇都是独一无二的海上艺术品。
index.52.en: Partnered with world's top naval architecture firms in Italy, Netherlands, Germany, perfectly blending artistic aesthetics with engineering performance — each yacht is a unique seafaring artwork.

index.56.zh: 在地中海、加勒比海、东南亚、中东、北欧等全球30+热门海域设有服务基地，无论您的航程指向何方，我们都能即时响应。
index.56.en: Service bases in 30+ popular waters worldwide including Mediterranean, Caribbean, Southeast Asia, Middle East, Northern Europe — wherever your voyage leads, we respond instantly.

index.60.zh: 每位客户配备专属Yacht Manager，7×24小时响应需求，从航线规划到岸上行程，真正实现"拎包出海"的无忧体验。
index.60.en: Each client is assigned a dedicated Yacht Manager, 7×24h response, from route planning to onshore itineraries — truly realizing a worry-free "pack & sail" experience.

index.64.zh: 覆盖从精致日间巡航到百米超级游艇的全谱系产品矩阵
index.64.en: Covering the full product matrix from refined day cruising to 100m superyachts

index.71.zh: 专为全球顶级富豪打造，融合宫殿级居住空间与尖端航海科技。
index.71.en: Built for the world's top billionaires, blending palace-grade living space with cutting-edge maritime technology.

index.79.zh: 探险型远洋游艇，可深入南极、阿拉斯加等极地海域，不失五星舒适度。
index.79.en: Expedition superyacht, capable of reaching polar waters like Antarctica and Alaska without compromising 5-star comfort.

index.87.zh: 经典飞桥运动游艇，适合地中海沿岸巡航与岛屿跳岛之旅。
index.87.en: Classic flybridge motoryacht, ideal for Mediterranean coastal cruising and island hopping.

index.95.zh: 精致紧凑的日间巡航游艇，入门级奢华海享方案。
index.95.en: Refined and compact day cruiser, an entry-level luxury marine solution.

index.99.zh: "我们不制造游艇，我们编织海洋梦想。"
index.99.en: "We don't build yachts, we weave ocean dreams."

index.100.zh: "我们不制造游艇，我们编织海洋梦想。"
index.100.en: "We don't build yachts, we weave ocean dreams."

index.103.zh: 从最初的概念草图到最终的海上交付，奇幻假期的定制服务涵盖游艇诞生的每一个环节。
index.103.en: From initial concept sketches to final ocean delivery, Fantastic Vacation's customization service covers every stage of a yacht's birth.

index.104.zh: 我们的国际化团队汇聚了来自意大利、荷兰、德国、日本的顶尖设计师与工程师，在船体流体力学、内部空间规划、智能系统集成、环保动力方案等领域拥有深厚的专业积累。
index.104.en: Our international team brings together top designers and engineers from Italy, Netherlands, Germany, and Japan, with deep expertise in hull hydrodynamics, interior space planning, smart system integration, and eco-friendly propulsion solutions.

index.106.zh: 联合全球顶级船舶设计工作室，打造独一无二的视觉语言
index.106.en: In partnership with world's top naval design studios to create a unique visual language

index.108.zh: 精选意大利皮革、法国橡木、西班牙大理石等顶级材料
index.108.en: Premium materials selected: Italian leather, French oak, Spanish marble

index.110.zh: 稳定系统、减摇鳍、零速鳍、岸电系统全面定制
index.110.en: Stabilization systems, anti-roll fins, zero-speed fins, shore power — fully customized

index.112.zh: 全船智能中控、卫星通信、水下灯光、影院系统
index.112.en: Full-vessel smart control, satellite comms, underwater lighting, cinema systems

index.116.zh: 从地中海的蔚蓝海岸到加勒比的珍珠群岛，为您呈现地球上最令人心动的海上旅程
index.116.en: From the azure coast of the Mediterranean to the Pearl Islands of the Caribbean, presenting the most breathtaking sea journeys on Earth

index.119.zh: 蔚蓝海岸 · 地中海经典环线

index.120.zh: 摩纳哥→尼斯→戛纳→热那亚→阿马尔菲海岸，途经世界顶级游艇俱乐部。
index.120.en: Monaco → Nice → Cannes → Genoa → Amalfi Coast, passing the world's top yacht clubs.

index.125.zh: 珍珠群岛 · 加勒比海奢享之旅

index.126.zh: 巴哈马→特克斯凯科斯→英属维尔京群岛，清澈温水与隐秘海湾。
index.126.en: Bahamas → Turks & Caicos → British Virgin Islands, crystal-clear warm waters and hidden bays.

index.131.zh: 翡翠海域 · 安达曼海秘境巡游
index.131.en: Jade Waters · Andaman Sea Secret Cruise

index.132.zh: 普吉岛→皮皮岛→缅甸丹老群岛，丰富水上活动与地道泰式料理。
index.132.en: Phuket → Phi Phi → Myanmar's Mergui Archipelago, rich water activities & authentic Thai cuisine.

index.139.zh: 专业的游艇资产管理服务，让您的海上资产始终处于最佳状态
index.139.en: Professional yacht asset management services, keeping your marine assets in peak condition at all times

index.142.zh: 船员管理、日程调度、财务核算
index.142.en: Crew management, schedule coordination, financial accounting

index.145.en: Engine maintenance, antifouling paint renewal, equipment inspection

index.148.zh: 紧急抢修、船体修复、系统升级
index.148.en: Emergency repair, hull restoration, system upgrades

index.151.zh: 船级社检验、法定证书更新
index.151.en: Classification society inspection, statutory certificate renewal

index.154.en: H&M arrangement, P&I coordination, incident handling

index.159.zh: 每一个案例都是我们对卓越的不懈追求
index.159.en: Every case is our relentless pursuit of excellence

index.162.zh: 中东王室委托，历时38个月，搭载直升机平台、潜艇车库、IMAX影院。2024年荣获Asia Boating Awards年度最佳定制游艇。
index.162.en: Commissioned by Middle East royal family, 38 months in build, featuring helipad, submarine garage, IMAX theater. Winner of Asia Boating Awards 2024 Custom Yacht of the Year.

index.165.zh: 欧洲家族企业定制，途经12个国家24个港口，配备米其林主厨与私人潜水教练。
index.165.en: Customized for European family business, through 24 ports in 12 countries, with Michelin-starred chef and private dive instructor.

index.167.zh: 中东王室船队5年全托管
index.167.en: Middle East Royal Fleet 5-Year Full Management

index.168.zh: 管理3艘超级游艇（45m/62m/88m），5年零重大事故运营记录。
index.168.en: Managing 3 superyachts (45m/62m/88m), zero major incidents in 5-year operation record.
